creator: tdhaan@sp.nl
text:
pecl-imagick causing segmentation faults in php5

Fix: 

Compile php5 with LINKTHR Link thread lib (for threaded extensions)
	I hope someone can make pecl-imagick port check for this, or at least issue a warning?
How-To-Repeat: 	install pecl-imagick and run php -v
	it might segfault.
